title: Anime Armoury
description:
Anime Armoury is a mod that adds various weapons, armor and other fun things from many different anime.



Current Features

7 Deadly Sins - Meliodas's Sword (With full counter & blocking)

One Piece - Luffy's Straw Hat
body:
Anime Armoury is a mod that adds various weapons, armor and other fun things from many different anime.



Current Features

7 Deadly Sins - Meliodas's Sword (With full counter & blocking)

One Piece - Luffy's Straw Hat



Planned Features

One Piece - Zoro's Swords

Jojo's - Dio throwing knives

BOTW/TOTK - Weapons, shields and armour

Assassination Classroom - Koro-sensei mask
